response.justification: While the candidate meets the educational and years-of-experience requirements (BS + 13 years), this is a critical domain mismatch. The role requires specialized expertise in hardware architecture, SoC/IP modeling, GPU design, and AI accelerator optimization—areas where the candidate has no demonstrated experience. Their background is entirely in full-stack software engineering (web, mobile, backends) with no hardware architecture, semiconductor design, or AI accelerator workload optimization experience. The current AI-agent infrastructure work appears to focus on frameworks and tooling, not hardware-level performance optimization. At a Principal level, domain expertise is non-negotiable.
strengths: Meets educational baseline and 13+ years of technical experience across diverse systems
Proven senior IC capability with strong systems thinking and full-stack problem-solving
Current exposure to AI infrastructure and frameworks could provide foundational context
concerns: Zero experience with SoC modeling, IP design, or hardware architecture—the core of this role
No background in AI accelerator optimization, deep learning workload profiling, or GPU architecture
Career entirely in software engineering; lacks the hardware-software co-design expertise required at Principal level

key_factors.factor: Hardware architecture and SoC modeling expertise
AI accelerator and deep learning optimization background
Senior engineering maturity and systems thinking
